name: activeset-projects
title: ActiveSet Projects
description: Manage ActiveSet client projects, links, reviews, scans, and tasks from Raycast.
author: activeset

commands.name: create-task
commands.title: Create Project Task
commands.description: Create a dashboard task and sync it to ClickUp when the project is linked.

commands.name: open-project-link
commands.title: Open Project Link
commands.description: Open or copy manual links from any project.

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: App Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL of the ActiveSet web app.

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: Raycast API Token
preferences.description: Private token matching RAYCAST_API_TOKEN on the web app.

preferences.name: userEmail
preferences.title: User Email
preferences.description: Your @activeset.co email for task attribution and review updates.
